title: buildah: force umask 022
body:
an umask more restrictive can break some images.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1305

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: changed it to 022, which is also the default used by systemd

@rh-atomic-bot r+
We probably need something similar for Podman

:pushpin: Commit 28b191d has been approved by `rhatdan`
